title: Focus on Positive Predictions
text: Precision focuses only on the rows where $$Y_{hat}=1$$.

title: Checking True and False Positives
text: Among those predicted positives, count how many actually have $$Y=1$$ and how many have $$Y=0$$.

title: Form the Precision Ratio
text: Precision is the proportion of predicted positives that are actually positive.
